notableEvents.label: Colby Thomas GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Colby Thomas grounds into a double play, shortstop Otto Lopez to second baseman Xavier Edwards to first baseman Kyle Stowers. Lawrence Butler out at 2nd. Colby Thomas out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Heriberto Hernández reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Alika Williams. Kyle Stowers to 3rd. Xavier Edwards to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jonah Heim pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jonah Heim pops out to shortstop Otto Lopez.

notableEvents.label: Jonah Heim pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jonah Heim called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Jonah Heim pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jonah Heim grounds out, shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Liam Hicks.

notableEvents.label: Passed ball run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Passed ball by catcher Shea Langeliers. Kyle Stowers scores. Otto Lopez to 3rd. Xavier Edwards to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Heriberto Hernández grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Heriberto Hernández homers (9) on a fly ball to center field. Otto Lopez scores. Xavier Edwards scores.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Shea Langeliers challenged (pitch result), call on the field was overturned: Otto Lopez steals (17) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Heriberto Hernández reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Heriberto Hernández reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Alika Williams. Kyle Stowers to 3rd. Xavier Edwards to 2nd.
